summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open maintainer-owned draft PRs. No shared canonical was chosen, no close actions are safe, and no security-sensitive refs were detected in the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Focused provider-schema hardening PR with review still pending; keep in inventory rather than close, merge, or choose as canonical.
Live Tool Search hardening thread has active author/review follow-up; closeout would be unsafe and merge/fix are not allowed.
Distinct agent-tool normalization and diagnostics hardening PR; keep related to the hardening family without closure or canonicalization.
Focused message-provider policy hardening PR with pending maintainer review; keep related and non-mutating.
Gateway hardening PR has unresolved review findings and related open follow-ups; keep related rather than close, merge, or escalate the whole shard.
